principles: Dark Mode First: Deep Navy backgrounds, not pure black, to reduce eye strain.
Gold for Glory: Use Gold (#facc15) strictly for 'Money', 'Wins', and 'Primary Actions'.
Blue for Structure: Use Blue (#3b82f6) for navigation, information, and admin links.
Density where it counts: Admin tables are dense; POS screens are touch-friendly and spacious.
Ticket Realism: Digital tickets should look like physical thermal receipts.

fonts.usage: Headings, KPIs, Ticket Numbers, Lottery Names
Body text, UI labels, Form inputs
Ticket IDs, Verification Codes, Logs, Receipt Data

buttons.primary: bg-yellow-400 text-slate-950 hover:bg-yellow-500 font-barlow font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)]

cards.metric: p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-slate-950 border-slate-700 focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-400/50 text-white placeholder:text-slate-600
inputs.pos_input: text-4xl font-mono text-center h-20 tracking-[0.5em] bg-black border-2 border-slate-700 focus:border-yellow-400

status_badge.base: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border

ticket_receipt.wrapper: bg-white text-black font-mono p-4 w-[300px] mx-auto shadow-2xl rotate-1 relative
ticket_receipt.header: text-center border-b-2 border-black border-dashed pb-4 mb-4
ticket_receipt.footer: text-center border-t-2 border-black border-dashed pt-4 mt-4 text-xs

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise texture on the dark background to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with 10% opacity for crisp edges.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use simple geometric ticket illustrations in line art (slate-700).

universal_guidelines: Always check 'company_id' in local storage or context before making API calls.
POS interface MUST NOT have global window scroll. It should be a fixed app-like experience.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (Success: Green/Gold, Error: Red).
All dates must be formatted with 'date-fns' taking timezone into account (America/New_York or America/Port-au-Prince).
Money values MUST be formatted with currency symbol (USD $ or HTG G).
Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, only for accents or active states.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building LOTTOLAB. Start by setting up the font imports in index.css. Then, configure tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette. Build the Layout shell (Sidebar + Header). Create the 'Ticket' component early as it is used in POS and Results. Focus on the POS interface speed - use keyboard listeners for numpad input.
